most_effective_strategies.strategy: Graph Strategy: To systematically build a comprehensive understanding of the perspectives on the new UFO congress hearings, we will explore diverse tweets discussing the hearings as well as check real-time trends to understand societal sentiment. The use of timelines from key users will facilitate insights from reputable and influential voices in the discussion.

insights: Congress is actively revisiting UFO hearings, signaling a renewed interest in UAPs.
The perception of these hearings is mixed, with criticisms of lack of hard evidence and substantive outcomes.
Social media reactions highlight a blend of skepticism and curiosity surrounding the hearings and related testimonies.
